response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use the System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient class

We can create a UdpClient instance and send a packet to the server

We can measure the time taken to send the packet using the DateTime.Now property

We can then compare the time before and after sending the packet to calculate the duration

This method is similar to ping but only one direction

We can also handle exceptions and ensure proper resource management

This approach allows us to track the time taken for a single direction UDP packet transmission
